title: Contract Metadata Interface
description: Reusable metadata for standard interfaces (ERC-20, ERC-721, etc.). Provides groups, functions, events, and messages that can be included by contract metadata files via the includes field.

groups.description: Named groups for organizing functions in the UI.

functions.description: Per-function metadata, keyed by ABI function name.

events.description: Per-event metadata, keyed by ABI event name.

errors.description: Per-error metadata, keyed by ABI error name.

messages.description: EIP-712 typed message metadata, keyed by primary type name.
